data.body:
Does your brain say, 

"I can't write this because..."?

If you think something like this dive in there and confront this avoidance statement. Be frontal. Where did this statement come from? Is it actually true or just an easy out?

Imposter syndrome wears many masks.

#writingcommunity #booksky
